name: Verdura Mista (Mixed Vegetablse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the stems from broccoli and quarter them lengthwise.
2. Cut florets into large pieces.
3. Blanch broccoli, cauliflower, and potatoes in boiling water for a few minutes, then drain.
4. Heat olive oil and safflower oil in a medium skillet.
5. Add one third of the chopped garlic to the pan and stir until it begins to color.
6. Add tomatoes and simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
7. Place blanched vegetables in a large, shallow baking dish.
8. Add remaining ingredients, including the rest of the chopped garlic, to the baking dish.
9. Toss lightly to combine.
10. Spread tomatoes on top of the vegetables.
11. Cover and bake in a preheated 500°F (260°C) oven until vegetables are cooked through, about 20 minutes. Do not overcook.
